bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Making EDIBLE CHURROS using a KID’S TOY?! ✨Recipe: Ingredients: Graham Cracker Crust: • 1 cup water • ¼ cup unsalted butter, cubed • 1 tbsp granulated sugar • ¼ tsp salt • 1½ cup all-purpose flour • 2 large eggs • ½ tsp vanilla extract For the Cinnamon Sugar Coating: • ½ cup granulated sugar • ¾ tsp ground cinnamon Directions: 1. In a shallow dish, whisk together the sugar and cinnamon. Set aside. 2. In a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, bring the water, butter, sugar, and salt to a boil. Reduce heat to low and stir in the flour, mixing continuously until a smooth dough forms, about 1–2 minutes. Transfer to a mixing bowl and let cool for 5 minutes. 3. Add the vanilla extract and egg to the dough. Using an electric mixer, blend until fully combined and smooth. (It may look like it's separating at first—keep mixing, and it will come together!). 4. Transfer the dough to the toy. Pipe short 3–4-inch lengths onto a parchment-lined tray, using scissors or a knife to cut the ends cleanly. Let rest in the freezer for an hour. 5. In a large skillet, heat oil to 400°. Remove churros from freezer and place frozen dough into the hot oil. Fry until golden brown, about 3-5 minutes, flipping often. 6. Remove from oil with tongs and place on paper towel, then toss the churros in the cinnamon-sugar mixture until fully coated. 7. Serve immediately with chocolate ganache or warmed nutella for dipping, and enjoy!😊

(사이다도 괜찮아요!) -양파 반개 -대파 1줄 -설탕 1/2숟가락 (양파랑 콜라 넣어서 안넣어도 되는데 넣으면 더 감칠맛나요) 📚나름? 조리 순서 -오겹살 겉면을 찐한 갈색이 나올때까지 먼저 굽기 -아래에 고기기름이 자글자글할 때 김치 통으로 넣기 -김치 한번 뒤집어주고 김치 색깔이 조금 나면 콜라 다 넣기 -물도 500ml같이 넣어주고 끓기 시작하면 나머지 재료 투하 -30분 지나면 고기랑 김치 한번 뒤집어주고 30분 더 끓이기 (중간중간 물이 부족해서 탈 것 같으면 물 계속 추가해주기) -이후에 김치를 고기 위에 올려서 20분 끓이다가 마지막에 뚜껑열고 쫙 쫄여주기 이렇게 만들었어요! #김치찜 #통삼겹김치찜 #한식 #asmr #mukbang

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Classic chocolate chip cookies 🤤 Yields: 15-16 Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #chocolate #fyp #explorepage✨ #viralvideos

Ultra Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic (minced) 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil (for topping) Instructions Cook noodles until al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Add Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix well until it turns thick and glossy. Add chili oil and stir. Pour in heavy cream and mix until smooth, creamy, and slightly thickened (that rich orange color 🔥). Add noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top and let it melt into the sauce. Add dumplings and sausages on top. Cover and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and extra chili oil drizzle. . #buldak #buldakramen #eat #cook #Foodie

Key Health Benefits of Pilates: Deep Core Strength: Pilates targets the deep abdominal muscles and pelvic floor, creating a strong "powerhouse" that supports the spine and protects the back. Improved Posture and Alignment: By strengthening neglected postural muscles and promoting better body awareness, it helps correct slouching and alignment issues. Increased Flexibility and Mobility: The exercises focus on lengthening muscles while strengthening them, which improves joint mobility and overall flexibility. Reduced Back Pain and Injury Prevention: It strengthens muscles around the spine and hips, helping to alleviate pain and lower the risk of injuries. Toned Muscles Without Bulk: Using eccentric contraction, Pilates develops long, lean muscle tone rather than building mass. Mental Well-being and Stress Relief: The focus on precise movement and breathing promotes relaxation, reduces cortisol levels, and enhances mental concentration. Accessible Low-Impact Exercise: Because it is low-impact, it is accessible to various fitness levels and provides a safe way to exercise #fyp #targetaudience #pilates #motivation #pilatesbyizzy

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

#mascara  Le mascara est un produit cosmétique destiné à maquiller les cils en les allongeant, les épaississant, les recourbant ou en intensifiant leur couleur afin de mettre en valeur le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, appliqué à l’aide d’une brosse spécifique, et contient des pigments, des cires et des agents fixateurs permettant d’améliorer l’apparence des cils tout en assurant une bonne tenue du maquillage.

반세기, 50여년 동안 모든 걸 직접 손으로 만드는 의정부 함흥냉면 📍흥미관  (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 제일시장 다동 63호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/xQNb7Lqr 🧊비빔냉면 9천원 ⏰매일 9시~20시 의정부 제일시장에서 50년 넘는 동안 함흥냉면의 자존심을 지켜오고 있는 ‘흥미관’입니다. ​이곳의 냉면이 특별한 이유는 요즘 시대에 정말 보기 드문 ‘수제 반죽’ 방식을 고집하기 때문인데요.  사장님이 직접 반죽하고 바로 뽑아낸 면발은 기성품과는 차원이 다른 쫄깃하고 탱글한 식감을 자랑합니다. ​특히 육수부터 비빔 양념, 고명에 들어가는 모든 재료를 사장님이 직접 정성으로 만드시는데요.  실제로 먹어보니 과하게 달거나 맵거나 짜지 않고, 모든 맛이 조화롭게 어우러진 깊은 ‘손맛’ 그 자체였습니다! ​날이 점점 더워지고 여름이 다가오니 시원하고 쫄깃한 이 집 냉면이 자꾸만 생각나네요. 진정한 노포의 내공이 담긴 냉면 맛집을 찾으신다면 꼭 한 번 방문해 보세요! - 50 Years of Tradition! The Legendary Handmade Cold Noodles 📍 Heungmigwan, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: Da-dong 63, 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/xQNb7Lqr 🧊 Spicy Mixed Cold Noodles (Bibim-naengmyeon): 9,000 KRW ⏰ Hours: Daily 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM Welcome to 'Heungmigwan,' a place that has proudly preserved the tradition of Hamhung Naengmyeon for over 50 years in Uijeongbu Jeil Market. What makes this place special is its insistence on the "handmade dough" method, which is rare to find these days. The noodles, freshly kneaded and pressed by the owner, boast a chewy and bouncy texture that is on a whole different level from factory-made ones. From the broth to the spicy seasoning and toppings, every ingredient is crafted by hand with great care. The taste is perfectly balanced—not too sweet, spicy, or salty—offering the deep flavor of true craftsmanship. As the days get warmer, you'll find yourself craving these refreshing and chewy noodles. If you're looking for an authentic, time-honored noodle spot, this is it! #서울맛집 #의정부 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

L'Oreal Telescopic Mascara is an mascara that creates the effect of false eyelashes. Some features of the product: Elongation and separation. Eyelashes increase in size by 60%, while the makeup looks natural and natural. Liquid consistency. The product is easy to apply without forming lumps, does not spread or smear, dries quickly without being imprinted on the skin. Rich black pigment. One coating is enough for flawless makeup. Convenient silicone brush. The bristles on the applicator are located at a sufficient distance from each other. The brush easily separates the eyelashes, as if combing them, and gives the hairs a bend. Care components. The mascara contains beeswax, carnauba wax, paraffin, stearic acid and jojoba oil. Durability. The pigment will not be damaged even when in contact with liquid, will not suffer from the sun and heat. #mascara #cosmetics #beauty #puf #lorealparis @L’Oréal Paris

Review 21 loại toner pad trên thị trường, sau khi trải nghiệm hơn 1 năm rưỡi, Trang đã rút ra được rất nhiều tips và cách lựa chọn sản phẩm phù hợp với nhu cầu da của mình! Hy vọng video này sẽ giúp bạn tham khảo thị trường trước khi mua toner pad cho mình! Video của mình hơi dài, cảm ơn bạn đã xem hết nha! ✨  Những hãng tonerpad mà Trang sử dụng: 1. Skinfood khoai tây: AWY-XVJ-QPD 2. Skinfood cà rốt: BJV-ABC-CED 3. Numbuzin (centella): ABK-KQF-KPY 4. Beplain: ABV-FPW-VQJ 5. Abib: CLW-BWP-GJE 6. Dearklairs: AEQ-RTZ-SZA 7. Mediheal: CMB-JGT-AMR 8. Sungboon Editor: CHD-FPW-FFE 9. Ohui: hết hàng 10. CNP: ANS-WLE-PWD 11. Torriden: CDZ-ASX-UTN 12. Medicube xanh dương (zero pore pad mild): BXL-KVU-PHA 13. Medicube xanh lá (super cica pad):  họ đổi sang mẫu exosome cica BVB-EBN-CXD 14. Medicube nâu (deep vit C): BTF-GPP-HAJ 15. Medicube xanh lá (exosome cica calming): BVB-EBN-CXD 16. Numbuzin (vitamin niacinamide đậm đặc): CBP-CCC-LBY 17. Biodance: AJL-RXD-YFX 18. Nadeshiko: CCR-UQT-XZM 19. Emmie màu hồng: CCE-NYB-LLX 20. Emmie màu xanh dương: BUQ-GVC-HPH 21. Found a brunch spot on Main Street that’s actually worth the hype. 🍳 Everything we tried was so good, and the portions were solid. We didn’t end up getting anything “Turkish” (I was craving basic eggs) but I love how they have a basic egg options along with their inspired Turkish menu! I saw people getting their biscoff milkshake and I also heard they have a baklava latte which I will need to try next time. 👀  📍Eggstatic 3950 Main St, Vancouver  #vancouverfood #vancouverfoodie  #vancouverrestaurants #vancouvereats #thingstodoinvancouver
